instruction:
Add comprehensive edge case tests for `find_active_file`.


Existing tests for reference:
```r

```
```r
expect_snapshot(find_active_file(), error = TRUE)
```


The existing tests cover basic functionality. Add tests for:
1. NULL inputs to each argument
2. Empty vectors/strings: character(0), "", integer(0)
3. Boundary values: 0, 1, -1, NA, NaN, Inf
4. Invalid input types (passing numeric where character expected, etc.)
5. Missing arguments (use expect_error with class matching)
6. Very long inputs (strings > 1000 chars, vectors > 10000 elements)
context:
Package: devtools v2.4.6.9000
Description: Tools to Make Developing R Packages Easier
Function: find_active_file
Parameters: arg, call
Test patterns used: expect_snapshot, test_that
Expectations used: expect_snapshot

Function Code:
```r
find_active_file <- function(arg = "file", call = parent.frame()) {
  if (!is_rstudio_running()) {
    cli::cli_abort("{.arg {arg}} is absent but must be supplied.", call = call)
  }
  normalizePath(rstudioapi::getSourceEditorContext()$path)
}
```
